programme.title: Arts24

programme.title: Crime Story
programme.desc: An old man suffering from cancer seeks revenge on the thieves who have destroyed his life.

programme.title: Crime Story
programme.desc: Seorang pria lanjut usia yang menderita kanker, melakukan aksi balas dendam kepada para pencuri yang telah menghancurkan hidupnya.

programme.title: Beneath Us
programme.desc: The American Dream becomes a nightmare for a group of undocumented day laborers hired by a wealthy couple.

programme.title: Beneath Us
programme.desc: Ideologi Impian Amerika menjadi mimpi buruk bagi sekelompok pekerja harian ilegal yang dipekerjakan oleh pasangan kaya raya.

programme.title: The Call
programme.desc: When a veteran 911 operator takes a life-altering call from a teenage girl who has just been abducted, she realizes that she must confront a killer from her past in order to save the girl's life.

programme.title: The Call
programme.desc: Saat seorang operator 911 veteran menerima panggilan dari seorang gadis remaja yang baru saja diculik, ia menyadari bahwa ia harus menghadapi sang pembunuh dari masa lalunya demi menyelamatkan nyawa gadis itu.

programme.title: Shut In
programme.desc: When a young mother is barricaded inside a pantry by her violent ex-boyfriend, she must use ingenuity to protect her two small children from escalating danger while finding an escape.

programme.title: Shut In
programme.desc: Saat seorang ibu muda dikurung di dalam sepen oleh mantan pacarnya yang kejam, ia harus menggunakan kecerdikannya untuk melindungi kedua anaknya dari bahaya yang mengerikan selagi ia mencari cara untuk kabur.

programme.title: The Junkyard Dogs
programme.desc: Follows a dog who is a master escape artist, who must team up with his puppy pals to prevent their block from being robbed.

programme.title: The Junkyard Dogs
programme.desc: Mengikuti seekor anjing yang merupakan ahli melarikan diri, yang harus bekerja sama dengan teman-teman anak anjingnya untuk mencegah blok mereka dirampok.

programme.title: Hotel Dunsmuir
programme.desc: A young woman with extrasensory perception flees her abusive husband, only to land at an historic hotel containing a sinister presence.

programme.title: Hotel Dunsmuir
programme.desc: Seorang wanita muda dengan kemampuan indra keenam melarikan diri dari suaminya yang kasar, hanya untuk sampai di sebuah hotel bersejarah yang dihuni oleh kehadiran yang menyeramkan.

programme.title: Rogue River
programme.desc: A woman travelling through rural Oregon to scatter her father's ashes accepts a car ride from an old man after her car is towed.

programme.title: Rogue River
programme.desc: Seorang wanita berjalan-jalan melewati pedesaan di Oregon untuk menyebarkan abu ayahnya. Lalu, ia menerima tumpangan mobil dari seorang lelaki tua setelah mobilnya mogok.

programme.title: In Isolation
programme.desc: Four friends wanted to get away in a remote country house but when a mysterious man turns up and telling tales of a city ravaged by a epidemic and the looters who have pursued him, the friends rally to help.

programme.title: In Isolation
programme.desc: Empat teman ingin pergi ke rumah pedesaan terpencil, tapi kala seorang pria misterius muncul dan menceritakan kisah tentang sebuah kota yang dilanda wabah dan para penjarah mengejarnya, mereka berkumpul untuk membantu.

programme.title: Don't Suck
programme.desc: A veteran comedian's last chance at stardom takes him on the road with a young comic who reveals an unexpected past.

programme.title: Don't Suck
programme.desc: Kesempatan terakhir seorang komedian veteran untuk menjadi bintang membawanya ke jalan bersama seorang komedian muda yang mengungkap masa lalu yang tak terduga.

programme.title: Edge Of Fear
programme.desc: After being stabbed in the heart by ruthless home invaders, a man is left for dead. Now weak, outnumbered, and knife sticking from his chest, he attempts to do the impossible: save his wife from these murderers before he bleeds to death.

programme.title: War Pigs
programme.desc: A ragtag unit of misfits known as the War Pigs must go behind enemy lines to exterminate Nazis by any means necessary.

programme.title: War Pigs
programme.desc: Sebuah unit yang terdiri dari orang-orang dengan berbagai karakter aneh yang dikenal sebagai War Pigs harus maju ke garis perang untuk memusnahkan Nazi dengan segala cara.

programme.title: Dead Trigger
programme.desc: A mysterious virus has killed billions and turned many others into bloodthirsty zombies. Unable to stop the virus, the government develops a video game, 'Dead Trigger'.

programme.title: Dead Trigger
programme.desc: Sebuah virus misterius telah membunuh miliaran manusia dan mengubah banyak di antara mereka menjadi zombie haus darah. Pemerintah yang tak mampu menghentikan virus itu menciptakan permainan video 'Dead Trigger'.

programme.title: Americons
programme.desc: A high-velocity journey of an unsuspecting mortgage broker swallowed up in the sex, greed and over indulgence of the mid 2000's Real Estate boom.

programme.title: Americons
programme.desc: Sebuah film tentang seorang makelar hipotek yang tenggelam dalam kehidupan seks bebas, keserakahan dan kesenangan dari melonjaknya bisnis perumahan di pertengahan tahun 2000-an.

programme.title: Another Mother's Son
programme.desc: Lou lives on the Nazi-occupied Island of Jersey during World War 2. She accepts to hide a young Russian POW at her house at the risk of being imprisoned herself and takes care of him as if he was her own son.

programme.title: Elizabeth Harvest
programme.desc: Elizabeth arrives with her brilliant scientist husband Henry to his magnificent estate. Henry explains that everything in his world now belongs to her, all except for a locked-off room he forbids her from entering.

programme.title: Elizabeth Harvest
programme.desc: Elizabeth tiba di rumah mewah milik Henry, suaminya yang merupakan seorang ilmuwan nan brilian. Henry mengatakan bahwa semua yang ia miliki kini menjadi miliknya kecuali sebuah kamar yang dilarang untuk dimasuki.

programme.title: Any Bullet Will Do
programme.desc: In 1876, a bounty hunter tracks his own brother through Montana with the help of a fur trapper.

programme.title: Any Bullet Will Do
programme.desc: In 1876, a bounty hunter tracks his own brother through Montana with the help of a fur trapper.

programme.title: Any Bullet Will Do
programme.desc: Pada tahun 1876, seorang pemburu bayaran melacak saudaranya sendiri di seluruh Montana dengan bantuan seorang pemburu hewan ilegal.

programme.title: Any Bullet Will Do
programme.desc: Pada tahun 1876, seorang pemburu bayaran melacak saudaranya sendiri di seluruh Montana dengan bantuan seorang pemburu hewan ilegal.

programme.title: You're Not Alone
programme.desc: An evil entity begins to torment a mother and daughter, who are forced to face the inexplicable presence that inhabits the walls of their new home.

programme.title: Time Is Up
programme.desc: Vivien, a student who postpones happiness for the future, meets Roy, a troubled young man. But when an accident occurs and changes their lives, their focus shifts to being happy in the present.

programme.title: Time Is Up
programme.desc: Vivien, yang menunda kebahagiaannya untuk masa depan, bertemu dengan Roy, seorang pemuda bermasalah. Namun, sebuah kecelakaan terjadi dan mengubah hidup keduanya. Mereka pun berfokus untuk menjadi bahagia di masa kini.

programme.title: Room 203
programme.desc: Two best friends and roommates are terrified by the vengeful spirits dwelling in their apartment. Based on the novel published by Kobunsha and written by Nanami Kamon.

programme.title: Room 203
programme.desc: Film yang diangkat berdasarkan novel yang ditulis oleh Nanami Kamon ini mengisahkan tentang sepasang sahabat sekaligus teman sekamar yang dihantui oleh hantu pendendam yang tinggal di apartemen mereka.

programme.title: He's Way More Famous Than You
programme.desc: When an aspiring actress loses her support system in one fell swoop, she sets out with a stolen script, her brother, and his boyfriend to make a movie.

programme.title: He's Way More Famous Than You
programme.desc: Seorang wanita yang bermimpi menjadi aktris kehilangan orang-orang yang ia sayangi secara bersamaan. Ia bertekad untuk memproduksi sebuah film bersama saudara laki-lakinya beserta sang kekasih berbekal naskah curian.

programme.title: Resurrection Of Charles Manson
programme.desc: While a couple edits a Charles Manson movie in an Airbnb, the film's dark events begin to come true in the mysterious plot of a hidden leader.

programme.title: Resurrection Of Charles Manson
programme.desc: Saat sepasang suami istri mengedit film tentang Charles Manson di sebuah Airbnb, peristiwa-peristiwa kelam dalam film tersebut mulai menjadi kenyataan dalam plot misterius seorang pemimpin yang tersembunyi.

programme.title: Walk Of Shame
programme.desc: Setelah melakukan kencan kilat, seorang reporter terdampar di pusat kota L.A. tanpa membawa ponsel, mobil, kartu identitas atau uang, dan dalam waktu 8 jam ia harus menghadiri wawancara kerja terpenting dalam hidupnya.

programme.title: The Retaliators
programme.desc: An upstanding pastor uncovers a dark and twisted underworld as he searches for answers surrounding his daughter's brutal murder.

programme.title: The Lurking Fear
programme.desc: When a TV crew shoots a reality show at an abandoned mental institution, they encounter a horde of demons, leading to a bloody fight for survival.

programme.title: The Lurking Fear
programme.desc: Ketika kru TV merekam sebuah reality show di sebuah rumah sakit jiwa yang terbengkalai, mereka bertemu dengan gerombolan iblis, yang menyebabkan pertarungan berdarah untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: The Fourth State
programme.desc: A German journalist investigating the Russian secret service gets caught up in a terrorist plot in Moscow.

programme.title: A Tale Of Two Guns
programme.desc: In the lawless West, a notorious brotherhood of killers and thieves called The Cowboys reigns over the land with brutal fists and fast guns. Fate finally catches up with them.

programme.title: A Tale Of Two Guns
programme.desc: Di Barat yang tak ada aturan hukum, The Cowboys, kakak-beradik pembunuh dan pencuri nan terkenal, menguasai wilayah tersebut dengan tinju brutal dan senjata api. Namun, takdir akhirnya datang menghampiri mereka.

programme.title: Spread
programme.desc: A sex comedy centered on a serial womanizer and his jilted lover.

programme.title: Spread
programme.desc: Sebuah film komedi dewasa yang menceritakan seorang pria hidung belang dan kekasihnya yang ia campakkan.

programme.title: American Boogeyman
programme.desc: The intrepid FBI agents Kathleen McChesney and Robert Ressler, organize one of the largest manhunt in history to apprehend America's most infamous serial killer, Ted Bundy.

programme.title: American Boogeyman
programme.desc: Agen Kathleen McChesney dan Robert Ressler nan pemberani mengatur salah satu perburuan terbesar dalam sejarah untuk menangkap seorang pembunuh berantai paling terkenal di Amerika, Ted Bundy.

programme.title: In Isolation
programme.desc: Four friends wanted to get away in a remote country house but when a mysterious man turns up and telling tales of a city ravaged by a epidemic and the looters who have pursued him, the friends rally to help.

programme.title: In Isolation
programme.desc: Empat teman ingin pergi ke rumah pedesaan terpencil, tapi kala seorang pria misterius muncul dan menceritakan kisah tentang sebuah kota yang dilanda wabah dan para penjarah mengejarnya, mereka berkumpul untuk membantu.

programme.title: Don't Suck
programme.desc: A veteran comedian's last chance at stardom takes him on the road with a young comic who reveals an unexpected past.

programme.title: Don't Suck
programme.desc: Kesempatan terakhir seorang komedian veteran untuk menjadi bintang membawanya ke jalan bersama seorang komedian muda yang mengungkap masa lalu yang tak terduga.

programme.title: Edge Of Fear
programme.desc: After being stabbed in the heart by ruthless home invaders, a man is left for dead. Now weak, outnumbered, and knife sticking from his chest, he attempts to do the impossible: save his wife from these murderers before he bleeds to death.

programme.title: The Fog
programme.desc: A thick mist full of vengeful spirits haunts a prosperous island town off the coast of Oregon, as its inhabitants try to learn their town's dark secret in order to stop it.

programme.title: Ode To Joy
programme.desc: Charlie has a neurological disorder in which strong emotions, especially joy, make him faint. He lives with his brother. Working as librarian gives him a quiet environment, but then Francesca enters the library and his life.

programme.title: The Grudge
programme.desc: A house is cursed by a vengeful ghost that dooms those who enter it with a violent death.

programme.title: Bad Santa
programme.desc: A miserable conman and his partner pose as Santa and his Little Helper to rob department stores on Christmas Eve. But they run into problems when the conman befriends a troubled kid.

programme.title: The Tuxedo
programme.desc: A chauffeur discovers that his employer’s high-tech tuxedo grants superhuman abilities. He must now stop a villainous plot while mastering the suit’s powers.

programme.title: The Tuxedo
programme.desc: Seorang sopir menemukan bahwa tuksedo majikannya yang canggih memberinya kemampuan super. Ia harus menghentikan rencana jahat sambil menguasai kekuatan tuksedo tersebut.

programme.title: 28 Days Later
programme.desc: Four weeks after a mysterious, incurable virus spreads throughout the United Kingdom, a handful of survivors try to find sanctuary.

programme.title: 28 Days Later
programme.desc: Empat minggu setelah virus misterius yang tidak dapat disembuhkan menyebar ke seluruh Inggris, segelintir orang yang selamat mencoba mencari tempat perlindungan.

programme.title: Life (Galaxy Premium)
programme.desc: A team of scientists aboard the ISS discover a rapidly evolving Martian predator that needs to be kept away from Earth at all costs.

programme.title: Life (Galaxy Premium)
programme.desc: Sebuah tim ilmuwan di atas Stasiun Luar Angkasa Internasional (ISS) menemukan predator Mars yang berevolusi dengan cepat dan harus dijauhkan dari Bumi dengan segala cara.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, an elite IMF agent, is framed for a mole within his team. He must race against time to clear his name and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, agen elit IMF, dijebak atas pengkhianatan dalam timnya. Ia harus berpacu dengan waktu untuk membersihkan namanya dan mencegah bencana global.

programme.title: The Sum Of All Fears (Galaxy Premium)
programme.desc: CIA analyst Jack Ryan must stop the plans of a Neo-Nazi faction that threatens to incite a catastrophic conflict between the United States and Russia by detonating a nuclear weapon at a football game in Baltimore, Maryland.

programme.title: The Sum Of All Fears (Galaxy Premium)
programme.desc: Analis CIA Jack Ryan harus menghentikan rencana faksi Neo-Nazi yang mengancam akan memicu konflik dahsyat antara Amerika Serikat dan Rusia dengan meledakkan senjata nuklir di pertandingan sepak bola di Baltimore, Maryland.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Far From Home
programme.desc: Peter decides to leave super heroics behind for a while to join his friends on a vacation. However, his plan is quickly scrapped when he agrees to help uncover the mystery of several elemental creature attacks.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Far From Home
programme.desc: Peter memutuskan untuk pergi berlibur bersama teman-temannya. Namun, rencananya berantakan saat ia membantu mengungkap misteri dari sejumlah serangan makhluk elemental.

programme.title: Ghost In The Shell
programme.desc: In the near future, Major Mira Killian is the first of her kind: A human saved from a terrible crash, who is cyber-enhanced to be a perfect soldier devoted to stopping the world's most dangerous criminals.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: A young Peter Parker/Spider-Man begins to navigate his newfound identity as the web-slinging superhero.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: Peter Parker nan muda mulai beradaptasi dengan identitas barunya sebagai Spider-Man, sosok pahlawan super yang berayun menggunakan jaring laba-laba.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: A failed reporter is bonded to an alien entity, one of many symbiotes who have invaded Earth. But the being takes a liking to Earth and decides to protect it.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Seorang reporter yang gagal menjalin ikatan dengan sesosok alien, salah satu parasit yang menginvasi Bumi. Namun, makhluk tersebut menyukai Bumi dan memutuskan untuk melindunginya.

programme.title: Monster Hunter
programme.desc: When Cpt. Artemis and her loyal soldiers are transported to a new world, they engage in a desperate battle for survival against enormous enemies with incredible powers. Feature film based on the video game by Capcom.

programme.title: Monster Hunter
programme.desc: Ketika Kapten Artemis dan para prajuritnya yang setia dipindahkan ke dunia baru, mereka terlibat dalam pertempuran sengit untuk bertahan hidup melawan musuh-musuh besar dengan kekuatan yang luar biasa. Film berdasarkan video game buatan Capcom.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Jo March reflects back and forth on her life, telling the beloved story of the March sisters - four young women, each determined to live life on her own terms.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Jo March reflects back and forth on her life, telling the beloved story of the March sisters - four young women, each determined to live life on her own terms.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Jo March merenungkan kembali kehidupannya, menceritakan kisah cinta dari March bersaudari - empat remaja putri, masing-masing bertekad untuk menjalani hidup dengan caranya sendiri.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Jo March merenungkan kembali kehidupannya, menceritakan kisah cinta dari March bersaudari - empat remaja putri, masing-masing bertekad untuk menjalani hidup dengan caranya sendiri.

programme.title: Mission...: Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: The IMF is shut down when it's implicated in the bombing of the Kremlin, causing Ethan Hunt and his new team to go rogue to clear their organization's name.

programme.title: Eagle Eye
programme.desc: Two strangers, Jerry and Rachel, drawn together by a mysterious woman. They must work together to stop a deadly plot orchestrated by an unknown force.

programme.title: Eagle Eye
programme.desc: Dua orang asing, Jerry dan Rachel, dipertemukan oleh seorang wanita misterius. Mereka harus bekerjasama menghentikan rencana mematikan yang diatur oleh kekuatan tak dikenal.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: A married couple wake up to discover that the sex tape they made the evening before has gone missing, leading to a frantic search for its whereabouts.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: Sepasang suami istri terbangun dan mendapati rekaman seks yang mereka buat malam sebelumnya telah hilang, yang mengakibatkan mereka panik dan mencari keberadaan rekaman tersebut.

programme.title: The Legend Of Zorro (Galaxy Premium)
programme.desc: Despite trying to keep his swashbuckling to a minimum, a threat to California's pending statehood causes the adventure-loving Don Alejandro de la Vega and his wife, Elena, to take action.

programme.title: The Legend Of Zorro (Galaxy Premium)
programme.desc: Meskipun berusaha meminimalkan aksi petualangannya, ancaman terhadap status kenegaraan California yang akan datang menyebabkan Don Alejandro de la Vega yang menyukai petualangan dan istrinya, Elena, mengambil tindakan.

programme.title: Pineapple Express (Galaxy Premium)
programme.desc: A process server and his marijuana dealer wind up on the run from hitmen and a corrupt police officer after he witnesses his dealer's boss murder a competitor while trying to serve papers on him.

programme.title: Pineapple Express (Galaxy Premium)
programme.desc: Seorang pengantar surat panggilan pengadilan dan pengedar ganja miliknya akhirnya menjadi buronan para pembunuh bayaran dan seorang polisi korup setelah ia menyaksikan bos pengedarnya membunuh seorang pesaing saat mencoba mengantarkan surat panggilan pengadilan kepadanya.

programme.title: Daddy's Home
programme.desc: Brad Whitaker is a radio host trying to get his stepchildren to love him and call him Dad. But his plans turn upside down when their biological father, Dusty Mayron, returns.

programme.title: The Equalizer 2 (Galaxy Premium)
programme.desc: Robert McCall serves an unflinching justice for the exploited and oppressed, but how far will he go when that is someone he loves?

programme.title: The Equalizer 2 (Galaxy Premium)
programme.desc: Robert McCall menegakkan keadilan tanpa kompromi bagi mereka yang dieksploitasi dan tertindas, tetapi seberapa jauh ia akan bertindak ketika yang menjadi korban adalah orang yang ia cintai?

programme.title: The Intruders (Galaxy Premium)
programme.desc: After the traumatic loss of her mother, a teenaged girl tries to uncover the dark secrets behind her new home, in spite of her father's disbelief.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible 2
programme.desc: IMF agent Ethan Hunt is sent to Sydney to find and destroy a genetically modified disease called "Chimera".

programme.title: Mission: Impossible 2
programme.desc: Agen IMF, Ethan Hunt dikirim ke Sydney untuk menemukan dan menghancurkan penyakit hasil rekayasa genetika yang disebut "Chimera".

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: A man who believes he has put his mysterious past behind him cannot stand idly by when he meets a young girl under the control of ultra-violent Russian gangsters.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: Seorang pria yang merasa yakin bahwa ia telah meninggalkan masa lalunya nan misterius tidak bisa tinggal diam kala ia bertemu dengan seorang gadis muda yang berada di bawah kendali gangster Rusia nan sangat kejam.

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: A team of scientists aboard the International Space Station discover a rapidly evolving life form that caused extinction on Mars and now threatens all life on Earth.

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: Sebuah tim ilmuwan yang tiba di Stasiun Luar Angkasa Internasional menemukan kehidupan nan berkembang pesat yang menyebabkan kepunahan di Mars dan kini mengancam kehidupan semua makhluk di muka Bumi.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, an elite IMF agent, is framed for a mole within his team. He must race against time to clear his name and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, agen elit IMF, dijebak atas pengkhianatan dalam timnya. Ia harus berpacu dengan waktu untuk membersihkan namanya dan mencegah bencana global.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible 3
programme.desc: IMF agent Ethan Hunt comes into conflict with a dangerous and sadistic arms dealer who threatens his life and his fiancée in response.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible 3
programme.desc: Agen IMF, Ethan Hunt berkonflik dengan seorang pedagang senjata yang berbahaya dan sadis, bahkan mengancam nyawanya dan tunangannya.

programme.title: Fantastic Friends, Ep 5
programme.desc: Extraordinary exploits as twin brothers meet spellbinding guests, explore enchanting cities, and take on phenomenal challenges - while managing all kinds of mischief along the way.

programme.title: Fantastic Friends, Ep 5

Morgan Freeman: Breaking...
programme.desc: Perhaps it is his distinctive velvet smooth voice and calming demeanor that made Morgan Freeman a household name. World-renowned actor, Freeman has starred in over 100 movies in just three decades and continues to break barriers.

programme.title: Whitney: Behind The Voice
programme.desc: A powerful journey into the meteoric rise of Whitney Houston - from her gospel roots to global superstardom - unraveling the tangled relationships, haunting battles with addiction, and the heartbreaking fall of a once-unshakable voice, before her untimely end.

programme.title: Whitney: Behind The Voice
programme.desc: Sebuah perjalanan dahsyat ke dalam kebangkitan Whitney Houston yang meroket - dari akar musik gospelnya hingga menjadi superstar global - mengungkap hubungan yang rumit, perjuangan yang menghantui melawan kecanduan, dan kejatuhan yang memilukan dari suara yang dulunya tak tergoyahkan, sebelum akhirnya meninggal dunia.

programme.title: Celine Dion: The Heart Goes On
programme.desc: This documentary follows the life, love and career of French-Canadian pop icon Celine Dion. Her story is one of strength, resilience and love.

programme.title: Celine Dion: The Heart Goes On
programme.desc: Film dokumenter ini mengisahkan kehidupan, cinta, dan karier ikon pop Prancis-Kanada, Celine Dion. Kisahnya adalah kisah tentang kekuatan, ketahanan, dan cinta.

programme.title: Atlantic: In The Wild, Ep 1
programme.desc: The Atlantic Ocean is vast, wild and unforgiving. Stretching from the Antarctic in the south to the Arctic in the north. Four films, each documenting a different season in and around the Atlantic, through the lives of the animals that live there. Every season brings new challenges. All must be resilient and adaptable if they're to survive a year in the wild Atlantic.

programme.desc: Marty is set to make waves literally by installing floats on his bush plane, allowing him to fly to a remote lake in search of moose. programme.title: Kennedy, Ep 5
programme.desc: Kennedy explores the remarkable journey of John F. Kennedy, from his privileged upbringing within a powerful political family to becoming the 35th President of the United States. The series delves into his leadership during critical moments such as the Cold War era, highlighting his vision, charisma, and the challenges he faced both domestically and internationally.

programme.title: Kennedy, Ep 5
programme.desc: Kennedy mengulas perjalanan luar biasa John F. Kennedy, dari masa muda dalam keluarga politik berpengaruh hingga menjadi Presiden ke-35 Amerika Serikat. Serial ini membahas kepemimpinannya dalam berbagai momen penting seperti era Perang Dingin, menyoroti visi, karisma, serta tantangan yang dihadapinya baik di dalam negeri maupun internasional.

programme.title: Epic Movie
programme.desc: Four orphans visit Willy Wonka's chocolate factory and end up in the world of Gnarnia while trying to hide from Willy. They must now seek the help of fascinating people to escape Gnarnia.

programme.title: Epic Movie
programme.desc: Empat anak yatim piatu mengunjungi pabrik cokelat Willy Wonka dan terdampar di dunia Gnarnia saat berusaha bersembunyi dari Willy. Mereka kini harus mencari bantuan orang-orang yang menarik untuk melarikan diri dari Gnarnia.

programme.title: Mr. & Mrs. Smith
programme.desc: A husband and wife struggle to keep their marriage alive until they realize they are both secretly working as assassins. Now, their respective assignments require them to kill each other.

programme.title: Mr. & Mrs. Smith
programme.desc: Sepasang suami istri berjuang mempertahankan pernikahan mereka, hingga akhirnya mereka menyadari bahwa masing-masing diam-diam bekerja sebagai pembunuh bayaran. Kini, tugas mereka justru mengharuskan mereka untuk saling membunuh.

programme.title: Don't Say A Word
programme.desc: When the daughter of a psychiatrist is kidnapped, he's horrified to discover that the abductors' demand is that he break through to a post traumatic stress disorder suffering young woman who knows a secret.

programme.title: Don't Say A Word
programme.desc: Ketika putri seorang psikiater diculik, ia terkejut mengetahui bahwa tuntutan para penculik adalah agar ia berhasil menembus kondisi gangguan stres pascatrauma (PTSD) yang dialami oleh seorang wanita muda yang mengetahui sebuah rahasia.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Manhattanite Ashley is known to many as the luckiest woman around. After a chance encounter with a down-and-out young man, however, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Ashley, seorang warga Manhattan, dikenal oleh banyak orang sebagai wanita paling beruntung di sekitarnya. Namun, setelah pertemuan tak terduga dengan seorang pemuda yang sedang mengalami kesulitan, ia menyadari bahwa ia telah menukar keberuntungannya dengan keberuntungannya.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A retired bodyguard suffering from dementia finds a new friend in a young girl. When her life is threatened by her father's connection with crime, he must call upon his abandoned skills to save her.

programme.title: Epic Movie
programme.desc: Four orphans visit Willy Wonka's chocolate factory and end up in the world of Gnarnia while trying to hide from Willy. They must now seek the help of fascinating people to escape Gnarnia.

programme.title: Creature From The Black Lagoon
programme.desc: A strange prehistoric beast lurks in the depths of the Amazonian jungle. A group of scientists try to capture the animal and bring it back to civilization for study.

programme.title: Creature From The Black Lagoon
programme.desc: Seekor makhluk prasejarah aneh bersembunyi di kedalaman hutan Amazon. Sekelompok ilmuwan mencoba menangkap hewan tersebut dan membawanya kembali ke peradaban untuk dipelajari.

programme.title: The Howling
programme.desc: After a bizarre and near deadly encounter with a serial killer, a television newswoman is sent to a remote mountain resort whose residents may not be what they seem.

programme.title: The Howling
programme.desc: Setelah mengalami insiden aneh dan nyaris fatal dengan seorang pembunuh berantai, seorang jurnalis berita televisi dikirim ke sebuah resor pegunungan terpencil di mana para penghuninya mungkin tidak seperti yang terlihat.

programme.title: My Super Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: When a regular guy dumps a superhero for her neediness, she uses her powers to make his life a living hell.

programme.title: My Super Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: Seorang pria biasa meninggalkan kekasihnya yang seorang superhero karena kebutuhan emosionalnya yang berlebihan. Sebagai balas dendam, sang superhero menggunakan kekuatannya untuk menjadikan hidup pria itu neraka.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: A young man with teleportation abilities suddenly finds himself in the middle of an ancient war between those like him and their sworn annihilators.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda dengan kemampuan teleportasi tiba-tiba menemukan dirinya di tengah perang kuno antara orang-orang seperti dia dan para pemusnah massal mereka.

programme.title: Ken Arok-Ken Dedes
programme.desc: Ken Arok raised by criminals after being abandonned as a baby by his parents and became a fugitive from the law. He began to change after he met a religious leader Loh Gawe and fell in love with Ken Dedes.

programme.title: Tumbal 97
programme.desc: The death of famous artist Saeful Djamil's wife, draws Prista's attention. At the time of taking pictures at the scene of the accident, Prista startles when she sees a shadow of an old blond granny on her pictures.

programme.title: Skandal
programme.desc: Mischa, who bored with her marriage, find her life changes when she sees Vincent, her former lover. But he is so possessive that he insists on continuing the relationship and starts to threaten Mischa's family.

programme.title: Skandal
programme.desc: Mischa, yang jenuh dengan pernikahannya, merasa bahagia ketika bertemu Vincent, sang mantan kekasih. Namun, Vincent nan posesif bersikeras untuk melanjutkan hubungan mereka dan mulai mengancam keluarga Mischa.

programme.title: Maju Kena Mundur Kena...
programme.desc: Dono dan Indro adalah teman satu kos dan anak buah Kasino di bengkel. Kasino melarang Dono dan Indro untuk tidak tertarik oleh wanita. Padahal secara diam diam, Kasino selalu merindukan seorang gadis yang fotonya ia temukan di sebuah majalah. Tanpa sengaja, ketika Dono sedang jaga malam, ia harus memperbaiki mobil Marina

programme.title: Dunia Mereka
programme.desc: For Filly, the guitar substitutes for her mother who was killed in a plane crash. Her talent and taste in music makes her joined the band Capung Biru and met Ivan Bramono.

programme.title: Hattrick
programme.desc: A football team who has differences and ego problems must win an International underground football tournament in order to save their own lives.

programme.title: Hattrick
programme.desc: Sebuah tim sepak bola dengan segala perbedaan dan permasalahan ego harus memenangkan sebuah turnamen sepak bola Internasional untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: 100% Halal
programme.desc: When she was just learning to cultivate love, Anisa Santosa, who had just married young to Putra Alfatih the husband of choice for her father, Ilham Santosa.

programme.title: 100% Halal
programme.desc: Saat ia baru belajar memupuk cinta, Anisa Santosa, yang baru saja menikah muda dengan Putra Alfatih, suami pilihan ayahnya, Ilham Santosa.

programme.title: 48 Jam Untuk Indah (IMC)
programme.desc: The story of a middle class man about how he will save his daughter from her sudden illness.

programme.title: 48 Jam Untuk Indah (IMC)
programme.desc: Kisah seorang pria kelas menengah tentang bagaimana ia mencoba menyelamatkan putrinya dari penyakit mendadak.

programme.title: Hotline 666
programme.desc: Erza is a pizza deliverer who never believed in fairy tales. One day, he get order to deliver pizza to a haunted house and locked overnight in there.

programme.title: Ponirah Terpidana (IMC)
programme.desc: Ponirah, who is regarded as bad luck for her family, is seduced by a pimp to work as a prostitute in Jakarta. She then determined to be the most expensive courtesan.

programme.title: Ponirah Terpidana (IMC)
programme.desc: Ponirah, yang dianggap sebagai pembawa kesialan bagi keluarganya, tergoda rayuan seorang mucikari untuk dijadikan wanita penghibur di Jakarta. Ponirah pun bertekad menjadi wanita penghibur termahal.

programme.title: Nazar
programme.desc: Cindy vows to marry Jajat, a geeky ketoprak seller who happens to pass by, if she wins a luxury car from the bottle cap lottery. Then Cindy really wins the luxury car but is now desperate to cancel her impulsive vow.

programme.title: Nazar
programme.desc: Cindy bersumpah menikahi Jajat, seorang penjual ketoprak nan culun, jika ia memenangkan sebuah undian mobil mewah dari tutup botol. Cindy pun menang, tetapi ia berusaha mati-matian untuk membatalkan sumpahnya.

programme.title: Pulau Hantu 2
programme.desc: Dante is again trapped in Ghost Island. Alongside Nero, they struggle to get out from the island. Whilst trying to get out, they meet 9 people who are making a rave party on the island.

programme.title: Menggapai Matahari
programme.desc: Rhoma Irama and his girlfriend, Kartika, are affected by a disaster. Rhoma accidentally kills a woman with his car who apparently is the sister of Ikang Fawzi, a rock star.

programme.title: Menggapai Matahari
programme.desc: Rhoma Irama dan kekasihnya, Kartika, tertimpa sebuah musibah kala Rhoma secara tak sengaja menabrak seorang wanita, yang ternyata adalah adik seorang penyanyi rock terkenal bernama Ikang Fawzi.

programme.title: Pulau Hantu
programme.desc: Eight teenagers are set to sail for a holiday. However, the yacht has to leave them in a private small island with a single resort. The island keeps a ghostly secret that starts to prey their lives one by one.

programme.title: Pengantin Pantai Biru
programme.desc: Having vacation on the beach, a group of friends hunted by a ghost bride who was raped and had her fiance killed a long time ago while honeymoon on the same place.

programme.title: Nada-Nada Rindu
programme.desc: Ramlan envies Rhoma's success and tries to sabotage his career. Rhoma's career is shattered, forcing him to start all over again.

programme.title: Nada-Nada Rindu
programme.desc: Ramlan merasa iri dengan kesuksesan Rhoma dan berupaya untuk menjatuhkan karier Rhoma. Karier Rhoma hancur berantakan sehingga ia harus memulai lagi semuanya dari awal.

programme.title: Bila Hati Perempuan Menjerit
programme.desc: Tells the story of Indahsari who is raped by Boy. When he is declared innocent, Indah took the law into her own hands because she found that Boy also raped his sister, Astri.

programme.title: Bila Hati Perempuan Menjerit
programme.desc: Tells the story of Indahsari who is raped by Boy. When he is declared innocent, Indah took the law into her own hands because she found that Boy also raped his sister, Astri.

programme.title: Belahan Jiwa
programme.desc: Cairo, Baby Blue, Arimbi, and Farlyna are a soulmates. Unknowingly by them, the quartet share their love to one person named Bumi, a man who can adapted of their different personality.

programme.title: Hijrah Cinta
programme.desc: The story follows Ust. Jefri Al Bukhori or Uje, once a rising star who wasted his talent in reckless living. Estranged from friends and breaking his mother’s hopes, his life takes a turn when Pipik enters, inspiring him to change and escape drugs..

programme.title: Hijrah Cinta
programme.desc: Kisah tentang Ust. Jefri Al Bukhori atau Uje, pemuda penuh bakat yang terjerumus dalam gaya hidup sia-sia hingga mengecewakan ibunya. Kehadiran Pipik membuka jalan baginya untuk berubah dan bangkit dari jerat narkoba.

programme.title: Kangen
programme.desc: Two lovebirds separated by fate, and has to deal with a heartbreaking feeling of longing for each other.

programme.title: Abdullah Dan Takeshi
programme.desc: A story of two boys who were born in a hospital in Japan and exchanged. The baby from the Arab descent was raised by a Japanese family, while the baby of Japanese descent was raised by the Arab family.

programme.title: Abdullah Dan Takeshi
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah tentang dua anak laki-laki yang tertukar saat lahir di sebuah rumah sakit di Jepang. Bayi keturunan Arab dibesarkan oleh keluarga Jepang, sedangkan bayi keturunan Jepang dibesarkan oleh keluarga Arab.

programme.title: Gentayangan
programme.desc: After being declared bankrupt by the court, Abimanyu Karindra has no choice but to bring his wife, their two children and his sister Sheila to settle in a parent's hotel in a mountain valley.

programme.title: Gentayangan
programme.desc: Usai dinyatakan bangkrut oleh pengadilan, Abimanyu Karindra terpaksa mengajak istri, kedua anak, serta adiknya yang bernama Sheila untuk tinggal di hotel peninggalan orang tua di sebuah lembah gunung.

programme.title: Lorong
programme.desc: Tells about the oddities of a hospital where Mayang gave birth. The mystery that happened to Mayang and Reza is related to the whereabouts of their baby.

programme.title: Lorong
programme.desc: Film ini menceritakan tentang sejumlah kejanggalan di rumah sakit tempat Mayang melahirkan yang menyimpan misteri terkait keberadaan buah hati Mayang dan Reza.

programme.title: Karmila
programme.desc: Adapted from a popular novel with the same title, Karmila tells a story about a medical student who becomes pregnant after sexually assaulted at a party.

programme.title: Jin & Jun (IMC)
programme.desc: After getting roughed up by bullies, a high school student in despair encounters a genie who can turn around his luck - and his fortunes.

programme.title: Jin & Jun (IMC)
programme.desc: Setelah dihajar para pengganggu, seorang siswa sekolah menengah yang putus asa bertemu dengan jin yang dapat membalikkan keberuntungannya - dan hartanya.

programme.title: Cinta Tapi Beda (IMC)
programme.desc: Cahyo and Diana are from different religions. Both of them want seriously continue their relationship and marry. Will their relationship work?

programme.desc: Sebuah kisah petualangan dan persahabatan burung-burung yang menghadapi bahaya, seperti monster, banjir, serta menjalankan tugas penting seperti pengiriman pesan, menunjukkan kasih sayang antar individu, dan mengatasi kesulitan bersama.

programme.title: Medika Natura
programme.desc: Tayangan yang menunjukkan kegiatan terapi sehat yang menyembuhkan para pasien melalui pengobatan alternatif oleh Gus Muhammad Al Karomah melalui racikan ramual herbal dan berbagai macam bahan tradisional dari Indonesia. Metode ini banyak membantu pasien dalam memulihkan kondisi kesehatan secara berangsur.

programme.title: Berkah Shop
programme.desc: Berbagai tayangan mengiklankan usaha barang/teknologi yang bermanfaat serta terdapat review dari orang yang menggunakan.

programme.title: Cooking Time
programme.desc: Pada tayangan ini menyajikan acara memasak oleh chef Jose Valencio

programme.title: My Health My Choice
programme.desc: Each episode features practical health tips, expert medical insights, and inspiring stories about staying fit. The show emphasizes that maintaining good health is a vital choice for everyday life.

programme.title: My Health My Choice
programme.desc: Setiap episode menghadirkan tips kesehatan praktis, penjelasan dari ahli medis, serta kisah inspiratif dalam menjaga tubuh tetap bugar. Program ini membantu pemirsa memahami bahwa menjaga kesehatan adalah keputusan penting dalam kehidupan sehari-hari.

programme.title: Like A Flowing River
programme.desc: The lives of three young men since the national college entrance examination reopens in 1978. The three men develop their own careers respectively.

programme.title: Like A Flowing River
programme.desc: Kisah hidup tiga pemuda sejak ujian masuk perguruan tinggi nasional dibuka kembali pada tahun 1978. Ketiga pemuda tersebut mengembangkan karier mereka masing-masing.

programme.title: Muslimpedia
programme.desc: Tayangan program yang menyuguhkan hal-hal unik yang akan membuka khazanah informasi seputar dunia muslim. Dibawakan dengan gaya pop dan moderen.

programme.title: The Cloth Story
programme.desc: Join host, DJ and artist Arabyrd as she dives into the stories behind the uniqueness of batik, songket, and other clothing from the Malay culture.

programme.title: The Cloth Story
programme.desc: Bergabunglah dengan pembawa acara, DJ, dan artis Arabyrd saat ia menyelami kisah-kisah di balik keunikan batik, songket, dan pakaian lainnya dari budaya Melayu.

programme.title: Khazanah Kenyalang
programme.desc: An enriching documentary series that unveils the diverse historical, cultural, and societal heritage of Sarawak, meticulously preserved and curated by the Sarawak State Library.

programme.title: Khazanah Kenyalang
programme.desc: Serial dokumenter yang mengungkap beragam warisan sejarah, budaya, dan sosial Sarawak, yang dilestarikan dan dikuratori dengan cermat oleh Perpustakaan Negara Bagian Sarawak.

programme.title: Galeri Publik Avesta
programme.desc: a JAKTV program that explores, analyzes, and presents a specific product or program

programme.title: Galeri Publik Avesta
programme.desc: program JAKTV yang mengupas, membedah, dan menyampaikan sebuah produk atau program tertentu

programme.title: The Youth Doctor
programme.desc: In each episode, medical professionals and health experts discuss common health issues, answer questions from viewers, and explain medical topics in an easy-to-understand manner.

programme.title: The Youth Doctor
programme.desc: Dalam setiap episodenya, narasumber dokter atau ahli kesehatan menjawab pertanyaan dari penonton serta menjelaskan berbagai topik medis secara jelas dan mudah dipahami.

programme.title: Medika Natura
programme.desc: Tayangan yang menunjukkan kegiatan terapi sehat yang menyembuhkan para pasien melalui pengobatan alternatif oleh Gus Muhammad Al Karomah melalui racikan ramual herbal dan berbagai macam bahan tradisional dari Indonesia. Metode ini banyak membantu pasien dalam memulihkan kondisi kesehatan secara berangsur.

programme.title: Global Us
programme.desc: Pada tayangan ini menyajikan berita mancanegara dengan berita terkini dan mengangkat kebudayaan di suatu negara.

programme.title: Mirror Story
programme.desc: Video-video kolaborasi bersama para content creator yang menyoroti hal-hal yang sulit untuk dijelaskan dengan logika. Malah kadang-kadang makhluk tak kasat mata justru menampakkan dirinya. Mereka ada di sekitar kita.

programme.title: Three Queens
programme.desc: The story centers on a struggling daycare worker, his escort boyfriend, and a scrappy older widow living together. As they navigate life’s challenges, relationships, and personal crises, they support each other through financial and emotional ups and downs with humor and heart.

programme.title: Three Queens
programme.desc: Cerita mengikuti seorang pekerja penitipan anak yang kesulitan secara finansial, pasangan kekasihnya yang bekerja sebagai escort, dan seorang janda lansia yang tangguh yang tinggal bersama mereka. Ketiganya saling mendukung menghadapi tantangan hidup, hubungan, dan berbagai krisis eksistensial sambil mencoba tetap bertahan secara ekonomi dan emosional dalam situasi yang sering kocak dan menyentuh hati.

programme.title: Senyum Quran
programme.desc: Senyum Quran is a religious program that invites viewers to understand the messages of the Quran in a simple and enjoyable way. Through inspiring stories and light explanations, this program presents the meaning of sacred verses that are relevant to everyday life.

programme.title: Senyum Quran
programme.desc: Senyum Quran adalah program religi yang mengajak pemirsa memahami pesan-pesan Al-Qur’an dengan cara sederhana dan menyenangkan. Lewat kisah inspiratif dan penjelasan ringan, tayangan ini menghadirkan makna ayat-ayat suci yang relevan dengan kehidupan sehari-hari.

programme.title: Chess Player
programme.desc: Di masa akhir dinasti Ming permainan Igo sangat populer terdapat empat aliran, dan lima pemain igo yang terhebat mereka bersaing untuk mendapat gelar "Raja Igo"

programme.title: Penghormatan Burung Kepada...

programme.title: Inovator
programme.desc: Menayangkan sebuah laporan dari berita mancanegara yang aktual, fakta, dan terkini.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: To everyone's surprise, including his own, Po, an overweight, clumsy panda, is chosen as protector of the Valley of Peace. His suitability will soon be tested as the valley's arch-enemy is on his way.

programme.title: Penguins Of Madagascar
programme.desc: Skipper, Kowalski, Rico and Private join forces with undercover organization The North Wind to stop the villainous Dr. Octavius Brine from destroying the world as we know it.

programme.title: Sahabat Selamanya Upin & Ipin
programme.desc: The fun and hilarious daily life of Upin & Ipin with their friends who have different personalities and backgrounds, including Mei-Mei, Jarjit Singh, Ehsan, Fizi, Mail, and Susanti.

programme.title: Sahabat Selamanya Upin & Ipin
programme.desc: Kehidupan sehari-hari Upin & Ipin yang menyenangkan dan penuh kelucuan bersama teman-teman mereka yang memiliki kepribadian dan latar belakang berbeda-beda, diantaranya Mei-Mei, Jarjit Singh, Ehsan, Fizi, Mail, dan Susanti.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S20
programme.desc: Thomas wants to go to the Great Railway Show, but the big engines say he's not strong or big enough to compete from the best around the world, but Thomas is determined to find a way.

programme.title: Entong Animasi
programme.desc: Animasi buatan Indonesia yang bercerita berdasarkan sinetron terkenal yaitu Si Entong yang masih bercerita tentang Memed dan Tibo yang bermusuhan dengan Entong.

programme.title: PAW Patrol S6
programme.desc: An ice floe carrying three penguins lands in the jungle. Now the pups must get them back to their frosty home!Daring Danny is locked out of the lighthouse Turbot left him to look after. Now a freighter is headed straight for Seal Island.

programme.title: PAW Patrol S6
programme.desc: Gumpalan es terapung yang membawa tiga penguin mendarat di hutan. Sekarang anak-anak anjing harus membawa mereka kembali ke rumah mereka yang dingin!Danny yang pemberani dikunci dari mercusuar yang ditinggalkan Turbot untuk dijaga. Sekarang sebuah kapal barang langsung menuju Pulau Seal.

programme.title: Titus The Detective
programme.desc: A mouse-detective with his rabbit and lizard friends in Steamburg. They will jointly expose the crime one of their biggest enemies, a cat named named Bulpan. Starting as a pickpocket, Bulpan works hard to become a very skilled criminal.

programme.title: Titus The Detective
programme.desc: Seorang detektif tikus bersama teman-teman kelinci dan kadalnya di Steamburg. Mereka akan bersama-sama mengungkap kejahatan salah satu musuh terbesar mereka, seekor kucing bernama Bulpan. Berawal dari seorang pencopet, Bulpan bekerja keras hingga menjadi penjahat yang sangat terampil.

programme.title: Dora S1
programme.desc: Dora and Boots have to wake up the Big Red Chicken before he floats down a waterfall!/Dora and friends must solve a series of questions to open a mysterious gift.

programme.title: Yameme
programme.desc: Yan Xiaomei, a kung fu–skilled mayor’s daughter, befriends Dimio, a Western exchange student. Their fantasy adventures blend action, humor, and folklore, celebrating friendship and East–West harmony.

programme.title: Yameme
programme.desc: Yan Xiaomei, pendekar kung fu putri wali kota Dongyan, berteman dengan Dimio, siswa pertukaran Barat. Petualangan fantasi penuh aksi menonjolkan persahabatan dan harmoni budaya Timur-Barat.

programme.title: Kamp Koral
programme.desc: SpongeBob and his friends spend the summer at the craziest camp in the Kelp Forest, Kamp Koral.

programme.title: Kamp Koral
programme.desc: SpongeBob dan teman-temannya menghabiskan musim panas di perkemahan paling gila di Hutan Kelp, Kamp Koral.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The misadventures of a talking sea sponge who works at a fast food restaurant, attends a boating school, and lives in an underwater pineapple.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Kesialan spons laut yang bisa berbicara yang bekerja di restoran cepat saji, bersekolah di sekolah perahu, dan tinggal di nanas bawah air.

programme.title: Penguins Of Madagascar
programme.desc: Skipper, Kowalski, Rico and Private join forces with undercover organization The North Wind to stop the villainous Dr. Octavius Brine from destroying the world as we know it.

programme.title: Upin & Ipin Bermula
programme.desc: A teenager named Badrol is on vacation visiting his grandfather in the village with his best friend Lim. However, their vacation turns into an adventure when they try to uncover a mystery in Kampung Durian Runtuh with the twins Upin & Ipin, Rajoo, and Rose.

programme.title: Upin & Ipin Bermula
programme.desc: Seorang anak remaja bernama Badrol yang sedang pergi liburan mengunjungi kakeknya di desa bersama sahabatnya Lim- Namun, liburan mereka berubah menjadi sebuah petualangan ketika mereka mencoba mengungkap sebuah misteri di Kampung Durian Runtuh bersama si kembar Upin & Ipin, Rajoo, dan Rose-

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: Petualangan bersejarah nan epik berlatar masa-masa penuh gejolak di masa Tiga Kerajaan. Cao Cao berusaha untuk memasukkan Guan Yu ke dalam pasukannya, tapi Guan tetap setia pada Liu Bei, yang merupakan musuh Cao.

programme.title: The Fate Of Reunion
programme.desc: Siluman Ular Hijau memperoleh pencerahan di bawah bimbingan Dao Qing dan perlahan jatuh cinta padanya. Namun, pengabdiannya pada Dao Qing membuatnya bereinkarnasi dan mengalami rasa sakit akibat kematian.

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: The film's story unfolds in the fictional country of Laika and in Hong Kong, China. A police academy student who has not yet graduated, Ashan (played by Gu Bin), is tasked with a dangerous mission. He helps the criminal organization by eliminating obstacles for their leader, Atian (played by An Zhi Jie), in prison. Ashan approaches Atian, gains his trust, and collects evidence against the criminal group. After both of them are released from prison, Ashan assists Atian in rising within the criminal organization in Hong Kong. After enduring numerous challenges, Atian successfully replaces the group's leader, Bao Ge (played by Zeng Zhiwei), becoming the new boss and taking control of the organization. However, just as Ashan is about to complete his mission, his true identity is exposed.

programme.title: The Fate Of Reunion

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 S3, Ep 4

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 S3, Ep 4
programme.desc: Musim ini menghadirkan petarung baru, termasuk bintang Thailand, penyanyi, petinju, model, dan penyanyi rap ke dalam ring tinju, serta menampilkan dua peraih medali emas Olimpiade yang bersaing untuk kejuaraan.

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: The film's story unfolds in the fictional country of Laika and in Hong Kong, China. A police academy student who has not yet graduated, Ashan (played by Gu Bin), is tasked with a dangerous mission. He helps the criminal organization by eliminating obstacles for their leader, Atian (played by An Zhi Jie), in prison. Ashan approaches Atian, gains his trust, and collects evidence against the criminal group. After both of them are released from prison, Ashan assists Atian in rising within the criminal organization in Hong Kong. After enduring numerous challenges, Atian successfully replaces the group's leader, Bao Ge (played by Zeng Zhiwei), becoming the new boss and taking control of the organization. However, just as Ashan is about to complete his mission, his true identity is exposed.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt, Ep 19
programme.desc: Who doesn't dream of living by the ocean? "Oceanfront Property Hunt" follows prospective buyers who set out to make their dream of living by the ocean a reality as they hunt for unique oceanfront properties along rugged coasts in search of spectacular ocean views.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt, Ep 19
programme.desc: Siapa yang tidak bermimpi tinggal di tepi laut? “Oceanfront Property Hunt” mengikuti calon pembeli yang bertekad mewujudkan impian mereka untuk tinggal di tepi laut dengan mencari properti tepi laut yang unik di sepanjang pantai yang berbatu-batu, demi mendapatkan pemandangan laut yang spektakuler.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways To Dine, Ep 17
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo explores some of the most unusual dining establishments on earth.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways To Dine, Ep 17

programme.title: Earth Sweepers, Ep 1
programme.desc: When they discover a humanoid robot named Dorothy that's known to be a weapon of mass destruction, they get involved in a risky business deal.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers, Ep 1
programme.desc: Ketika mereka menemukan robot humanoid bernama Dorothy yang diketahui sebagai senjata pemusnah massal, mereka terlibat dalam transaksi bisnis yang berisiko.

programme.title: Little Girl In The Window
programme.desc: When an amateur photographer notices "HELP" scrawled on a fogged window in a picture she took of an old house, she begins to suspect that the man living there isn't as mild-mannered as he seems.

programme.title: Little Girl In The Window
programme.desc: Ketika seorang fotografer amatir melihat "BANTUAN" tertulis di jendela berkabut dalam sebuah gambar yang diambilnya dari sebuah rumah tua, dia mulai curiga bahwa pria yang tinggal di sana tidak sopan seperti yang terlihat.

programme.title: My Child Has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica’s life turns upside down when she discovers a shocking truth: her fertility doctor is the biological father of her son. A story of betrayal, secrets, and the search for justice.

programme.title: My Child Has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Hidup Jessica berubah drastis saat ia mengetahui kebenaran mengejutkan: dokter fertilitasnya ternyata ayah biologis anaknya. Kisah tentang pengkhianatan, rahasia, dan pencarian keadilan.

programme.title: All Fixed Up... S3, Ep 7
programme.desc: A team of four people departed from Seoul to Jeonju in the morning. From designing and some interior renovations to developing the store's menu, they were able to handle it all!

programme.title: All Fixed Up... S3, Ep 7
programme.desc: Tim yang terdiri dari empat orang berangkat dari Seoul ke Jeonju di pagi hari. Mulai dari desain dan sejumlah renovasi interior hingga pengembangan menu toko, semuanya mampu mereka tangani!

programme.title: Hit-And-Miss Tour S1, Ep 18
programme.desc: Five celebrity friends go on a trip together; at each stop where they must spend money, they play games to determine who covers the costs for all.

programme.title: Hit-And-Miss Tour S1, Ep 18
programme.desc: Lima sahabat selebriti melakukan perjalanan bersama; di setiap pemberhentian tempat mereka harus menghabiskan uang, mereka memainkan permainan untuk menentukan siapa yang menanggung semua biaya.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping S6, Ep 84
programme.desc: Zombie House Flipping explores the recent trend of house flippers scooping up foreclosed and often abandoned zombie houses and renovating them to return neighborhoods to their former glory.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia S16, Ep 15
programme.desc: The sixteenth series of the Australian television cooking show MasterChef Australia, Top Australian chefs judge passionate home cooks who participate in competitive culinary challenges to develop their cooking skills and win the title of the best chef.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Dishes, Ep 1
programme.desc: Renowned chef Jason Atherton dives into Dubai's rich and diverse gastronomic heritage in this new culinary series about one of the fastest-growing foodie hubs in the world. With each of the 10 episodes focusing on a different aspect of Dubai's produce ranging from Spices to looking at Dubai's Innovation's.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy S1, Ep 7
programme.desc: Jake provides a step-by-step process for creating a main course and dessert that incorporate aspects from classic dishes and unique flavors all while keeping it simple.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy S1, Ep 7
programme.desc: Jake memberikan proses langkah demi langkah untuk membuat hidangan utama dan hidangan penutup yang menggabungkan aspek dari hidangan klasik dan cita rasa unik, semuanya dengan tetap menjaga kesederhanaannya.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping S5, Ep 70
programme.desc: Zombie House Flipping explores the recent trend of house flippers scooping up foreclosed and often abandoned zombie houses and renovating them to return neighborhoods to their former glory.

programme.title: Meals In Minutes S2, Ep 38
programme.desc: From my home kitchen to yours, "Meals in Minutes" is all about making cooking tastier, faster, and more fun. Not only will you get delicious recipes, but you'll also pick up some cooking tips to level up your kitchen skills. So, whether you're sitting down to enjoy the show or getting up to start cooking along, remember, it's your house, your rules.

programme.title: Meals In Minutes S2, Ep 38
programme.desc: "Meals in Minutes" tentang membuat masakan lebih lezat, lebih cepat, dan lebih menyenangkan. Anda tidak hanya akan mendapatkan resep lezat, tetapi Anda juga akan memperoleh beberapa kiat memasak untuk meningkatkan keterampilan memasak Anda.

programme.desc: Siapa yang tidak bermimpi tinggal di tepi laut? “Oceanfront Property Hunt” mengikuti calon pembeli yang bertekad mewujudkan impian mereka untuk tinggal di tepi laut dengan mencari properti tepi laut yang unik di sepanjang pantai yang berbatu-batu, demi mendapatkan pemandangan laut yang spektakuler.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Spirits, Ep 13
programme.desc: Follows Theresa Caputo as she explores the next phase of her personal life and embarks on a tour, including sold-out shows in London.

programme.title: Taken In Plain Sight
programme.desc: After a months-long investigation into her daughter's abduction, a mother thinks she's finally found the person responsible. But when the authorities dismiss her, she takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Single Black Female 3: Final
programme.desc: After being wrongfully arrested for murder, Monica has finally been proven innocent. All charges have been dropped and the police have shifted their focus to Simone, who has seeming disappeared. But Simone is bonding with her daughter Joy.

programme.title: Single Black Female 3: Final
programme.desc: Setelah ditangkap secara tidak adil atas tuduhan pembunuhan, Monica akhirnya terbukti tidak bersalah. Semua tuduhan telah dicabut dan polisi mengalihkan fokus mereka ke Simone, yang tampaknya menghilang. Namun Simone semakin dekat dengan putrinya, Joy.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: Movie, Pt 1
programme.desc: Alex Murdoch's family's hidden crimes begin piling up as he attempts to conceal his own financial felonies, and he falls into a dark spiral.

programme.title: Murder Below Deck
programme.desc: After leaving her unfaithful boyfriend and walking away from her job, Lauren escapes to a luxury yacht with her best friend. Romance sparks with charming entrepreneur Mark, but paradise unravels when his fiancée mysteriously disappears at sea

programme.title: Murder Below Deck
programme.desc: Usai memutuskan kekasihnya yang berselingkuh dan berhenti dari pekerjaannya, Lauren ikut sahabatnya bekerja di kapal pesiar mewah. Ia jatuh hati pada Mark yang menawan, namun suasana berubah mencekam ketika tunangannya hilang secara misterius di laut

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping S5, Ep 70

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: Woodpeckers come in 239 species, each one a colorful character with a story of its own. These birds call, but they do not sing. Instead, they drum on trees to send out messages. They use a chisel-tipped bill to drill into rotting trees looking for insects to eat. The Hole Story explores these abilities through the stories of woodpecker families across the world. Narrated by Paul Giamatti.

programme.title: Meet Nite Live
programme.desc: Hosted by Valentinus Resa with co-hosts, the show typically opens with a monologue about recent topics circulating in the public discourse, followed by guest interviews, on-scene reporting, and casual discussions about hot news.

programme.title: Meet Nite Live
programme.desc: Dipandu oleh Valentinus Resa bersama co-host, acara ini dimulai dengan monolog pembuka tentang berbagai topik yang ramai diperbincangkan di masyarakat, kemudian dilanjutkan dengan wawancara narasumber, laporan langsung dari lapangan, serta obrolan santai mengenai berita-berita hangat.

programme.title: Juragan Jaman Now
programme.desc: Juragan Jaman Now is an Indonesian business reality show airing on Metro TV since February 12, 2022. The show features micro, small, and medium-sized entrepreneurs in the food and beverage sector who will compete to secure additional funding and development advice from panelists. The hope is that the funds raised will help them grow their existing businesses.
